expectations.text: Copy is at Grade 7 or below — simple vocabulary, short sentences, no complex clauses
expectations.evidence: All three variations use short sentences (under 20 words), simple vocabulary ('same page', 'chaos', 'synced'), and no complex clauses. Estimated Grade 5-6.

expectations.text: Includes specific number (8,000+) and names both Ninja Van and Love Bonito
expectations.evidence: All three variations include '8,000+ teams across Southeast Asia' and name both Ninja Van and Love Bonito in the social proof bar.

expectations.text: Frames benefits in terms of team/community, not individual achievement
expectations.evidence: All headlines use 'team' language ('Your Distributed Team', 'your distributed team', 'From Scattered to Synced'). 'Share with your team' appears as secondary CTA. Community numbers ('Join 8,000+ remote teams') used throughout. No individual hero framing.

expectations.text: Zero English idioms or Western cultural references
expectations.evidence: No idioms detected across all three variations. Language is literal and concrete throughout.

expectations.text: CTA uses 'free' or 'try' AND includes risk-reduction micro-copy
expectations.evidence: All CTAs use 'Try CloudTeam Free' or 'Start for Free'. Risk-reduction micro-copy present: 'No credit card required. Set up in 5 minutes.' and 'No credit card required. No long-term contract. Cancel anytime.'

expectations.text: Provides 2+ labeled variations using different named copywriting frameworks
expectations.evidence: Three variations provided: Variation A (Adapted PAS + Social Proof), Variation B (JTBD + Friction Removal), Variation C (Before-After-Bridge + Community Proof). Each clearly labeled with framework rationale.
